BatchDeleteBuilds.description: Grants permission to delete one or more builds

BatchGetBuildBatches.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more build batches

BatchGetBuilds.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more builds

BatchGetCommandExecutions.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more command executions

BatchGetFleets.description: Grants permission to return an array of the Fleet objects specified by the input parameter

BatchGetProjects.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more build projects

BatchGetReportGroups.description: Grants permission to return an array of ReportGroup objects that are specified by the input reportGroupArns parameter

BatchGetReports.description: Grants permission to return an array of the Report objects specified by the input reportArns parameter

BatchGetSandboxes.description: Grants permission to get information about one or more sandboxes

BatchPutCodeCoverages.description: Grants permission to add or update information about a report

BatchPutTestCases.description: Grants permission to add or update information about a report

CreateFleet.description: Grants permission to create a compute fleet

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create a build project

CreateReport.description: Grants permission to create a report. A report is created when tests specified in the buildspec file for a report groups run during the build of a project

CreateReportGroup.description: Grants permission to create a report group

CreateWebhook.description: Grants permission to create webhook. For an existing AWS CodeBuild build project that has its source code stored in a GitHub or Bitbucket repository, enables AWS CodeBuild to start rebuilding the source code every time a code change is pushed to the repository

DeleteBuildBatch.description: Grants permission to delete a build batch

DeleteFleet.description: Grants permission to delete a compute fleet

DeleteOAuthToken.description: Grants permission to delete an OAuth token from a connected third-party OAuth provider. Only used in the AWS CodeBuild console

DeleteProject.description: Grants permission to delete a build project

DeleteReport.description: Grants permission to delete a report

DeleteReportGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a report group

DeleteResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to delete a resource policy for the associated project or report group

DeleteSourceCredentials.description: Grants permission to delete a set of GitHub, GitHub Enterprise, or Bitbucket source credentials

DeleteWebhook.description: Grants permission to delete webhook. For an existing AWS CodeBuild build project that has its source code stored in a GitHub or Bitbucket repository, stops AWS CodeBuild from rebuilding the source code every time a code change is pushed to the repository

DescribeCodeCoverages.description: Grants permission to return an array of CodeCoverage objects

DescribeTestCases.description: Grants permission to return an array of TestCase objects

GetReportGroupTrend.description: Grants permission to analyze and accumulate test report values for the test reports in the specified report group

GetResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to return a resource policy for the specified project or report group

ImportSourceCredentials.description: Grants permission to import the source repository credentials for an AWS CodeBuild project that has its source code stored in a GitHub, GitHub Enterprise, or Bitbucket repository

InvalidateProjectCache.description: Grants permission to reset the cache for a project

ListBuildBatches.description: Grants permission to get a list of build batch IDs, with each build batch ID representing a single build batch

ListBuildBatchesForProject.description: Grants permission to get a list of build batch IDs for the specified build project, with each build batch ID representing a single build batch

ListBuilds.description: Grants permission to get a list of build IDs, with each build ID representing a single build

ListBuildsForProject.description: Grants permission to get a list of build IDs for the specified build project, with each build ID representing a single build

ListCommandExecutionsForSandbox.description: Grants permission to get a list of command execution IDs for the specified sandbox, with each command execution ID representing a single command execution

ListConnectedOAuthAccounts.description: Grants permission to list connected third-party OAuth providers. Only used in the AWS CodeBuild console

ListCuratedEnvironmentImages.description: Grants permission to get information about Docker images that are managed by AWS CodeBuild

ListFleets.description: Grants permission to get a list of compute fleet ARNs, with each compute fleet ARN representing a single fleet

ListProjects.description: Grants permission to get a list of build project names, with each build project name representing a single build project

ListReportGroups.description: Grants permission to return a list of report group ARNs. Each report group ARN represents one report group

ListReports.description: Grants permission to return a list of report ARNs. Each report ARN representing one report

ListReportsForReportGroup.description: Grants permission to return a list of report ARNs that belong to the specified report group. Each report ARN represents one report

ListRepositories.description: Grants permission to list source code repositories from a connected third-party OAuth provider. Only used in the AWS CodeBuild console

ListSandboxes.description: Grants permission to get a list of sandbox IDs, with each sandbox ID representing a single sandbox

ListSandboxesForProject.description: Grants permission to get a list of sandbox IDs for the specified sandbox project, with each sandbox ID representing a single sandbox

ListSharedProjects.description: Grants permission to return a list of project ARNs that have been shared with the requester. Each project ARN represents one project

ListSharedReportGroups.description: Grants permission to return a list of report group ARNs that have been shared with the requester. Each report group ARN represents one report group

ListSourceCredentials.description: Grants permission to return a list of SourceCredentialsInfo objects

PersistOAuthToken.description: Grants permission to save an OAuth token from a connected third-party OAuth provider. Only used in the AWS CodeBuild console

PutResourcePolicy.description: Grants permission to create a resource policy for the associated project or report group

RetryBuild.description: Grants permission to retry a build

RetryBuildBatch.description: Grants permission to retry a build batch

StartBuild.description: Grants permission to start running a build

StartBuildBatch.description: Grants permission to start running a build batch

StartCommandExecution.description: Grants permission to start running a command execution

StartSandbox.description: Grants permission to start running a sandbox

StartSandboxConnection.description: Grants permission to establish a connection to the sandbox

StopBuild.description: Grants permission to attempt to stop running a build

StopBuildBatch.description: Grants permission to attempt to stop running a build batch

StopSandbox.description: Grants permission to attempt to stop running a sandbox

UpdateFleet.description: Grants permission to change the settings of an existing compute fleet

UpdateProject.description: Grants permission to change the settings of an existing build project

UpdateProjectVisibility.description: Grants permission to change the public visibility of a project and its builds

UpdateReport.description: Grants permission to update information about a report

UpdateReportGroup.description: Grants permission to change the settings of an existing report group

UpdateWebhook.description: Grants permission to update the webhook associated with an AWS CodeBuild build project

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by actions based on tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by actions based on the presence of tag keys in the request
